# Rivalry Chronicle v1
## Stu's Crew vs Paradis' Playmakers

League: 70985
Season: 2024
Scope: Weeks 1-17
Generated: 2026-03-24T13:59:11Z
Version: 1

## Head-to-Head Results

- Season 2024, Week 5: Stu's Crew def. Paradis' Playmakers 121.10-120.25
- Season 2024, Week 10: Stu's Crew def. Paradis' Playmakers 143.70-96.80
- Season 2024, Week 15: Paradis' Playmakers def. Stu's Crew 134.90-131.60

## Chronicle

Stu's Crew holds a 2-1 advantage over Paradis' Playmakers in their 2024 matchups. Their first two meetings were decided by narrow and wide margins respectively, with Stu's Crew prevailing in Week 5 by just 0.85 points and then by a larger gap in Week 10. Paradis' Playmakers secured their sole victory in Week 15 with a close contest, though Stu's Crew ultimately finished the season series ahead.
